block_00: And 5 steps to develop your own strategy
block_03: Hi there! If you have not yet decided on your plans for this year, we’ll help you. Read more about how to choose the right time for a trade, how to build your strategy, and of course, find out how well traders have started this year.
block_06: Finding Entries With the DeMarker Indicator
block_07: One of the main tasks of a trader is to find the best time to open or close a trade. There are many technical indicators for this purpose. We share how to use one of these indicators in more detail.
block_10: In case you are still in the process of drawing up a trading plan for 2021, keep our recommendations. We’ve compiled a list of factors you might want to consider when picking assets and planning your trading approach.
block_12: Developing a Trading Strategy of Your Own
block_13: New year, new dreams, new trading strategies. Read our tips on how to come up with your own trading strategy and ensure stable payouts.
block_15: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_41: As a homeless man, Kurt Degerman studied finance at the local library, was aware of the stock market news, and invested the money earned after delivering bottles in shares of Swedish companies.
block_42: He died at age 60 with a fortune of 124 gold bars worth $300,000 and securities worth more than $1,000,000.
